[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010100 2
1 00010000 1
2 00011000 2
3 01111000 4
4 11000000 2
5 10000000 1
6 11001111 6
7 01010101 4
